title: Identity/IAM Training Asset Management
summary: Submit evidence for managing training-only assets in the VLAN 60 jlm.lab Active Directory environment.
mentor_prompts: Confirm this is a training asset, not production infrastructure.
Place the asset in the correct OU.
Keep real infrastructure assets out of the training domain.
safety_notes: Training AD may manage training assets only.
Do not add real routers, switches, Proxmox management, Pi-hole, UniFi, or real household devices to the training domain.
Do not submit secrets or real credentials.
